[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010111010 5
1 1110011100 6
2 0111001111 7
3 0000110001 3
4 0111010101 6
5 0110111000 5
6 0110001010 4
7 0010111010 5

01 0000100100 2
12 0100000000 1
23 0000100010 2
34 1000010000 2
45 0111001110 6
56 0000100000 1
67 0101000001 3
70 0010011000 3

02 0100000100 2
13 0000000010 1
24 0000110000 2
35 1110001100 5
46 0000001010 2
57 0000100001 2
60 0011010001 4
71 0000010100 2

03 0000100000 1
14 0000000000 a
25 0010001010 3
36 1000001000 2
47 0101000011 4
50 0000010001 2
61 0001010101 4
72 0000000100 1

04 0000100000 1
15 0110001010 4 match 6
26 0000101010 3
37 1100000000 2
40 0011001011 5
51 0000110001 3 match 3
62 0101000101 4
73 0000000000 a

05 0100000100 2
16 0000001010 2
27 0000100010 2
30 1010011000 4
41 0001000101 3
52 0000000001 1
63 0001000001 2
74 0000010000 1

06 0000100000 1

31 1000010100 3

53 0000100001 2

75 0010001100 3

07 0100100000 2
10 0010001010 3

32 1100000100 3
